name: Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc.
description: Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) is America's largest military shipbuilding company and a provider of professional services to partners in government and industry. For more than a century, HII's Newport News and Ingalls shipbuilding divisions in Virginia and Mississippi have built more ships in more ship classes than any other U.S. naval shipbuilder. HII's Mission Technologies division supports the U.S. national security mission with unmanned systems, cyber and electronic warfare, AI, and advanced training solutions. Headquartered in Newport News, Virginia, HII employs more than 44,000 people.
